title: Action under Section 8(1)(b) against Shri Amit Kohli, absconders

Whereas the Central Government has reason to believe that the aforesaid person has absconded himself so that the order cannot be executed. 3. Now, therefore, in exercise of powers conferred by clause (b) of sub-section (1) of Section 8 of the said Act, the Central Government hereby directs the aforesaid person to appear before Shri Ajay Kumar, Superintendent, Delhi Zonal Unit, West Block-I, Wing-VII, R.K. Puram, New Delhi within 10 days of the publication of this order in the Official Gazette. [F.No.l/l/2009-PITNDPS] NITA GUPTA, Under Secy. Printed by the Manager, Govt, of India Press and Published by the Controller Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 1 of 1 --
